case_title: J. CARLO CANNELL ET AL VS. GRAIL PARTNERS, LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DONALD H. PUTMAN AS MANAGING PARTNER FOR DEFENDANT GRAIL PARTNERS, LLC ON JAN-15-2020 - CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2020 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 AT THE REQUEST OF DANIEL R. PRICE, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS J. CARLO CANNEL, ET AL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANNELL, J. CARLO JAMES CARLO CANNELL REVOCABLE TRUST CANNELL, PETER B.
